payload.answer: I’m not sure which Sam this note refers to. Can you clarify which Sam you mean before I save it?

entity_resolution.reason: The note references 'Sam' ambiguously and model confidence is low; cloud escalation is disabled, so no durable memory should be committed without user clarification.

details: No memory was saved because entity resolution confidence was low.
Cloud escalation was disabled, so the system is asking the user for clarification.

repair_options: Specify Sam’s full name or unique identifier.
